text.tspan: with Real Controller and Dummy Sensors
[C] Bench DC input temporarily substitutes the final
solar panel while controller, battery, and charger
the final flow source for interface and parser verification
[C] Analog emulator temporarily substitutes the final
level sensor for scaling and health-state verification
[C] Exit when the real XIAO-based node reads both
substitutes, reports power and modem health,
[PC] Seeed Studio Expansion Board Base for XIAO
